summary.message: Pipeline completed with degraded authority confidence. Review final report issues and recommendations.

errors.reason: Edge list ordering is not stable sorted order.

warnings: Unreachable structural islands were detected. See isolation_report for details.

issues.message: AST-to-DI divergence is tracked as a consistency signal (non-fatal by itself).
Cycle nodes violate cycle allowance policy flags.
Disconnected subgraphs are not explicitly marked as allowed isolation.
Unreachable nodes were detected from active entrypoints.

warnings: Disconnected islands were detected and classified (isolated_module/orphan_subgraph/cyclic_island).
Unexpected orphan_subgraph islands were observed and should be reviewed by policy.
recommendations: Annotate permitted cycles with explicit policy flags or refactor cycle ownership boundaries.
Mark intentional isolation explicitly or connect orphan_subgraph components to supported entrypoint flows.
Review AST-vs-DI divergence trends; treat as architecture drift signal rather than immediate rejection.
